title: V20 Truth Enforcement Schema — The Final Seal
description: The V20 Truth Enforcement Schema is the permanent gift left behind when both runners cross their finish lines. It consolidates all anti-drift rules from V14 through V19 into a single enforcement document. Any future AI touching this project MUST load this schema before responding. Any output that fails validation against this schema is REJECTED. Source: /learning-loop/learning-loop-journey-v13.1-to-v20.md, Section 4.

v20_sealed.description: The final seal. Once true, this project is permanently governed by this schema. Cannot be reverted without Tim's explicit approval and a GitHub rollback.

north_star_lock.description: The North Star that was declared when V20 was sealed. Any future run on this project must declare the same North Star or explicitly override it with Tim's approval.

north_star_statement.description: The exact North Star statement sealed at V20.

locked_at_v20.description: Confirms this North Star was locked when V20 was declared.

override_requires_tim_approval.description: Any attempt to change the North Star on this project requires Tim's explicit approval.

lock_in_declaration.description: Inherited from V15. Once the start gun fires, the race is sealed.

full_autonomy_declaration.description: Inherited from V15. The AI has complete editorial rights during the race.

github_rollback_protocol.description: Inherited from V15. The emergency brake that makes full autonomy safe.

anti_drift_rules.description: Consolidated anti-drift rules from V14 through V19. Source: /schemas/learning-loop-v14.schema.json and /schemas/learning-loop-v15.schema.json.

markdown_prohibited.description: V14 Rule: No Markdown narrative in any JSON data field. All text is structured JSON strings.

no_paraphrase_rule.description: V14 Rule: AI cannot summarize past decisions. Must quote exact record IDs. V18 extends this to structural enforcement: any field containing a decision, rule, or protocol step must be stored as a direct quote from the source document.

source_citations_required.description: V14 Rule: Every factual claim MUST cite a vault_path or context_record_id. No citation = REJECTED. V16 extends this with Citation Middleware: claims without citations are flagged UNVERIFIED and added to verification queue.

memory_anchors_required.description: V14 Rule: Every phase output must be anchored to a specific GitHub commit hash.

anti_drift_violations_must_be_empty.description: V15 Rule: The anti_drift_violations array must be empty for V20 to be declared. Any violation must be corrected before the race can end.

schema_validation_required.description: V14 Rule: All outputs must validate against their companion schema. Failure to validate = REJECTED.

perfect_recall_enforcement.description: V18 Perfect Recall Engine enforcement rules. Source: /learning-loop/learning-loop-journey-v13.1-to-v20.md, V18 section.

vault_retrieval_path_required.description: Every citation must include a vault_retrieval_path that resolves to an actual file in the GitHub vault. Not just a reference — a retrievable path.

no_paraphrase_structural.description: Any field containing a decision, rule, or protocol step must store the exact text from the source document. Paraphrasing is structurally prevented, not just discouraged.

historical_decision_log_required.description: Every time a rule or protocol step is changed during a race, the previous version must be logged with its vault path and commit hash. Silent rewrites are structurally prevented.

three_lines_defense.description: V19 Three Lines Defense model. Source: /skills/the-watchman.md (Third Line), /skills/citation-officer.md (Second Line).

first_line.description: Self-Enforcement. Before any phase output is accepted, the AI must verify its own compliance.

checklist.description: The self-enforcement checklist. Must include at minimum: (a) every claim has a vault citation, (b) no paraphrasing of protocol rules, (c) no Markdown narrative in JSON data fields, (d) North Star is unchanged.

second_line.description: Citation Verification. Every citation must be verified as a real vault path. Source: /skills/citation-officer.md.

verification_required.description: Every citation in the run output must be verified as a real vault path that exists in GitHub.

third_line.description: Watchman Audit. Independent audit at end of every phase. Source: /skills/the-watchman.md.

audit_required.description: The Watchman must run at the end of every phase and produce a drift severity assessment.

watchman_audit.description: V17/V19 Watchman Audit structure. Runs at end of every phase. Source: /skills/the-watchman.md.

drift_severity.description: Overall drift severity detected. NONE = clean. CRITICAL = immediate halt required.

violations_found.description: List of all violations found during the audit.

violations_corrected.description: List of all violations that were corrected.

final_clearance.description: True only when all violations have been corrected and drift severity is NONE.

build_provenance.description: V19 Cryptographic Provenance. Proves which agent built each deliverable. Source: /skills/the-harvester.md provenance_chain pattern.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the agent that produced this output.

run_id.description: Unique identifier of this specific race/run.

github_commit_hash.description: The GitHub commit hash of the final committed output.

schema_version_used.description: The schema version used to validate this output.

historical_decision_log.description: V18 enforcement: Every protocol rule change must be logged with previous version and commit hash. Silent rewrites are prevented.

memory_loss_probability_final.description: The final memory loss probability when V20 was sealed. Must be < 0.01.

vault_paths_sealed.description: All vault paths that are now permanently governed by this schema.
